name: Sarah Chen
content: Nigel is one of the most technically sharp engineers I've worked with. He takes ownership, ships fast, and the quality is always there. Our AI platform would not exist without him.

name: James Okafor
content: Hired Nigel as our first engineer — he built the entire product in 6 months. Full-stack, DevOps, AI features, everything. Exceptional.

name: Priya Sharma
content: Working with Nigel is effortless. He understands the product vision, asks the right questions, and delivers exactly what's needed — usually faster than expected.

name: Marcus Webb
content: Nigel's architectural decisions consistently age well. He thinks in systems, not just features. Would jump at the chance to work with him again.

name: Aisha Patel
content: We engaged Nigel for a 3-month contract and extended twice. He built our core document processing pipeline and it's been rock solid since day one.
